title: AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6127 / 53 OG No. 17, 5510 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1749, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item J-045.4 under Romblon, paragraph d, title J, section five, Appendix A of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is amended to read as follows:

"J-045.3 Ambulong (Sibuyan Island)âConstruction of causeway and landing: 130: 50: 50: 50: : : : : : : 1 : : :"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
